title: Balanced Iron Farms
description: Rebalance Minecraft's overpowered iron farms. Part of the Balanced Minecraft project.
body:
## Balanced Iron Farms **Balanced Iron Farms** aims to make iron farms less overpowered. Iron farms are still possible to make, but depending on how the mod is configured they will be less efficient and more complex. Do not expect existing iron farm designs to work with this mod. ## Features Iron golems will not be pushed by water streams
Iron golems will not target persistent mobs (mobs which won't despawn) These changes can be individually toggled in the config - `balancedironfarms.json5` ## Dependencies This mod only needs to be installed on the server (but also works in singleplayer) This mod requires [owo lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
You might also want to check out the other mods in the [Balanced Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/collection/s7K5qS4R) collection
